mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(user_id, password, user_name, age, gender, is_pregnant) VALUES (#{userId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{isPregnant})
mapper.select: SELECT user_no AS userNo, user_id AS userId, password, user_name AS userName, age, gender, is_pregnant AS isPregnant FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
